title: Buttery Crumbly Syrian Chickpea Flour Crumble
description: A hangover-cure dish featuring chickpea flour that's perfect for a quick snack or breakfast to get you back on your feet.

ingredients.name: 1 cup chickpea flour
ingredients.notes: Make sure it's freshly ground for best texture.

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine chickpea flour and melted butter.
Stir in finely grated orange peel and a pinch of salt. Mix well to form a crumbly dough.
Add a dash of cayenne pepper if desired for extra kick.
Divide the mixture into small balls or use your hands to shape them into discs.
Gently press each disc onto a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Cook until golden brown and crisp, turning occasionally.
Serve warm as a snack or a quick breakfast accompaniment.
